title: Goofy Ahh Mod
description: i made this mod a year ago there are dead memes in it but its a fun mod ig
body: making new actually not horrible mod now stay tuned ### Mod Overview This mod adds a lot of content of memes that died a long time ago (i made this mod a while ago but just uploaded it now) Here's a breakdown of everything currently included: *** #### **The "M" Plant**  * Looks like Drake but has no purpose except to drop a "Pee Bucket" when the block underneath is broken. * The Pee Bucket can be used for MLG water bucket tricks. * You get the M plant when you join the world each time. *** #### **Skibidi Ore** * A rare ore that drops the **Sigma Portal Igniter**. * Smelting the igniter produces **Poop** and unlocks the advancement **"SUPERSKIBIDI."** *** #### **Enderite Ore** * Found in the End, spawning around 1 vein per chunk with 3 ores per vein. * Mining it gives **Raw Enderite**, which can be smelted in a blast furnace to get **Enderite Ingots**. * Crafting Recipe for **Usable Enderite Ingots** (shapeless): * 2 Netherite Ingots * 2 Ender Eyes * 1 Shulker Shell * 1 Enderite Ingot * 1 Eye Armor Trim * 1 Spire Armor Trim * 1 Endstone * Produces **3 Usable Enderite Ingots.** ##### Why Use Enderite? * **Enderite armor and tools are extremely powerful!** * Crafting 9 usable Enderite Ingots into a block allows access to the **Sigma Dimension.** *** #### **Sigma Dimension** * Enter by creating a portal frame with Enderite Blocks and igniting it with the Sigma Portal Igniter. * Features thick fog, and you can sleep and respawn here. * Biomes include: * Desert * Deep Dark * Nether Wastes * The End * Bamboo Jungle * Custom **Fart Biome** (explained below) * Main block: **Dirtmond** (breakable with a shovel). * Found in both the Sigma Dimension and Overworld (rarer in the Overworld). * Drops **Diamond Fragments**, which can be crafted into **Diamond Shards** and then **Diamonds.** *** #### **Fart Biome** * Extremely rare biome with: * **Pee Trees**: Yellow and tall. * Brown terrain, water, and sky, with lots of fog. * Can spawn any structure, including Nether and End structures. ##### Custom Structures: 1. **Emerald Fart** * A massive "FART" text structure made entirely of Emerald Blocks. 2. **Poop Shrine** * A large poop-shaped structure with a face, containing diamonds inside. * Beware of the new boss, **Freaky Gojo**, which spawns here! ##### Freaky Gojo: * A tough boss that deals **penetration damage** (2.5 hearts per hit). * Drops a music disk resembling light gray dye that plays a note block version of **"Not Like Us."** *** #### **Rizz Potion** * Brewed with the **"Not Like Us" music disk.** * Effect: * Displays "(Your User) has rizz!" in chat. * When it wears off, "(Your User) lost their rizz" is displayed. * While active, there’s a 1/100 chance to spawn a villager every tick. *** #### **New Villager Type: Rizzler** * Workbench: Waxed Weathered Cut Copper Stair. * Trades: | Level |Input |Output | | ---------- |-------------------------------------------------- |-------------------------- | | Novice |7 Pufferfish |1 Drake Skibidi Music Disk | | Apprentice |1 Usable Enderite Ingot |64 Poop | |   |1 Pee Bucket + 4 Raw Enderite |1 Freaky Gojo Spawn Egg | | Journeyman |12 Emeralds + 1 Freaky Gojo Egg |2 Freaky Gojo Spawn Eggs | | Expert |64 Redstone Comparators + 2 Freaky Gojo Spawn Eggs |2 Enderite Blocks | | Master |64 Pufferfish |1 Bedrock | |   |10 Enderite Blocks + 64 Mangrove Propagules |12 End Portal Frames | *** #### **Slot Machine Block** * Crafted with: * 1 Enderite Block (center) * 4 Stone (corners) * 4 Redstone Blocks (remaining slots) * Gambling Results: * **50%**: Lose 2 usable Enderite Ingots. * **25%**: Get your ingot back. * **15%**: Win 3 ingots. * **5%**: Win 7 ingots. * **2.5%**: Win 15 ingots. * **1.5%**: Win 31 ingots. * **1%**: Win 63 ingots. *** ### Stay Connected * **Discord**: 0gagaer6 * **YouTube**: [Cylinder](https://www.youtube.com/@Enum.PartType.Cylinder) * Feel free to suggest ideas or subscribe for new mods (not updating this)!
